reviews.review_title: really cool but very uncool people
reviews.review_description: i love this game!! jumpscares are horrifying, monster walk sounds are horrifying, and everything else. I only have 2 complaints. 1. Sometimes when im trying to run away from a monster the game takes away my arms and moves them wherever they want for a good 3 seconds. I also have no control of my limbs meaning i cant move. 2. Community is HORRIBLE. but i understand thats not your fault that they act that way so im rating it 5 stars anyways. Update: Lowered to 4 stars because it takes ages for the "Join random room" door to work :( lowered to 1 star cause it doesn't work at all now >:(
Perfect, best horror gorilla tags game in my opinion, the jumpscares and sounds are amazing, the only thing that is a bit buggy is when you die, you spawn under the table, but overall it’s great.
It's very well made, fun, and the people are nice to play with. I recommend this game 10/10 for if you like scary gorilla tag knock-offs like scary baboon

Best game ever I love this game. The movement is so nice. Only thing that bothers me a lot is the buttons that you can hear every button that gets pushed for everything else is really nice and I wish this game had get more updates.

The movement is amazing, no lag and the
 monsters are great. And the map design is great and so is the shop design. Great game in general
Really fun and get your heart beating love the game and i will always play it when im bored and in the morning to wake me up five stars
